insight: You've made a great start with just one session, and your consistent score of 10% shows that you're applying what you've learned, so keep building on that momentum and focus on improving your understanding of the material. By analyzing your last score, identify one area where you can make a slight adjustment, such as reviewing a specific concept or changing your approach to a particular type of question, and make that change in your next session.
